Posted last quarter

Simple Website Development for Business Plan

  • Fixed price
  • Intermediate
  • Est. budget: $350.00

I’d like to create a 3–4 page website for my padel consulting company, focused on the management, development, and business growth of padel projects in the U.S. and internationally. The goal is to build a clean, modern, and professional website that highlights my experience and the services I offer to clubs, investors, and brands looking to join or expand within the fast-growing padel industry. 🔹 Reference Website For structure and concept inspiration, please check: 👉 https://jf2academy.com/methodology https://offthewallconsulting.co/ This link is only a conceptual reference, not a design model. I’d like something more elegant, premium, and minimalist, with a light palette, strong visuals, and a consulting-style aesthetic. 🔹 Website Scope (3–4 Pages) The site will be bilingual (English and Spanish), and I’ll provide all final text and translations once the structure is approved. HOME / INICIO Hero banner with professional padel imagery and a short mission statement. Introduction to what the company does. Clear CTA (e.g., “Work with us” / “Join the padel movement”). SERVICES / SERVICIOS Detailed description of the four main service areas: Padel Club Management & Operations Corporate Events & PRO-AM Experiences Padel Academy & Player Development Investment & Consulting for New Padel Projects THE PADEL OPPORTUNITY / EL POTENCIAL DEL PÁDEL Section highlighting the growth of padel in the U.S. Key data and insights for investors. Market trends and opportunities. CONTACT / CONTACTO Simple contact form (Name, Email, Message). Direct email: Requirements I’d like you to handle the entire project — including design, structure, hosting setup, domain connection, and publication. The design should be modern, clean, responsive, and SEO-friendly. I’ll provide the text and images once the layout is ready. The goal is to have a professional digital presence ready to go live. Budget My total budget is $350 (all included) — covering design, development, hosting setup, and full delivery until the website is live. What you’ll need from me to begin.

Posted 2 quarters ago

Script to process Rocket Solver .rsl file into parsable (.csv or .txt) format

  • Hourly
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week

Rocket Solver is a public Poker solver for a No Limit Holdem, that can be used to compute Game Theory Optimal strategies. These strategic game trees are saved into their inhouse .rsl files. This file amongst other things, tells the user what an optimal strategy looks like at each node of the defined game tree. I am a Professional Poker player (and former software engineer), who would like to export the strategies inside this file, and plug them into other more streamline tools I have built for studying Poker. Unfortunately Rocket Solver does not have a built in functionality to export the complete strategies into parsable formats. I have tried using AI to guide me on how to reverse engineer these files but have not had any success. I would like to hire someone experienced at reverse engineering, to provide me a solution that reads these .rsl files and saves the strategies into a parsable format (.txt / .csv etc). My guess is it isn't much work, but I have no experience doing any reverse engineering at all. Happy to discuss. I have provided a very simple example .rsl files.

Technical Co-Founder / Automation Engineering Partner Needed for AI-Powered Business Solutions

  • Hourly
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: More than 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

I'm the founder of yourAIarch, an AI-powered architecture and automation consulting firm. I'm seeking a long-term technical partner to build and maintain sophisticated automation systems that will transform how businesses operate. I am based in NYC and have made connections in this space. I am new to the market but have a lot of experience in marketing and ongoing support from mentors. Please read the description below and feel free to reach out to me if you have questions. youraiarch.com About the Role This is NOT a one-off project—I'm looking for an ongoing partnership with someone who can serve as the technical backbone of our automation practice. You'll be responsible for building, and maintaining automation solutions while I focus on client relationships and business development. What We're Building Automation services include: 1. Email Automation & Campaigns - Multi-channel nurture sequences with dynamic content personalization, behavioral triggers, A/B testing, and advanced segmentation 2. AI Call Agents - Conversational AI voice systems for customer support, lead qualification, appointment scheduling, and follow-ups with natural language processing 3. Lead Qualification & Routing - Intelligent lead scoring systems that automatically route prospects to appropriate sales teams based on behavior, demographics, and engagement 4. Custom Workflow Automation - End-to-end process automation connecting disparate systems, eliminating manual tasks, and streamlining operations across departments 5. CRM & System Integration - Seamless data synchronization between CRMs, marketing platforms, project management tools, and custom databases 6. AI-Powered Analytics & Insights - Real-time dashboards, predictive analytics, automated reporting, and actionable intelligence from business data Technical Requirements Have expertise in: - AI/ML Integration: OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, or similar LLM platforms; prompt engineering and RAG systems - Automation Platforms: Make.com, Zapier, n8n, or custom-built solutions - Backend Development: Node.js, Python, or similar; API design and microservices architecture - CRM APIs: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Monday.com - Voice AI: Twilio, Bland.ai, Vapi, or similar telephony platforms - Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or similar; complex query optimization - Cloud Infrastructure: AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure; serverless architectures - Email Platforms: SendGrid, Mailgun, Customer.io integration What Makes You Ideal - You've built production-grade automation systems that handle real business operations - You can architect scalable solutions that grow with client needs - You're comfortable working independently and taking ownership - You can translate business requirements into technical solutions - You have experience with white-label solutions or agency work - You're entrepreneurial and excited about building something meaningful Partnership Structure This is an ongoing relationship, not a fixed-term contract. I'm offering a financial share of each completed deal delivered to clients. As we build our automation portfolio and scale our practice, there's significant opportunity for this to evolve into equity partnership. Initial Scope - Build 2-3 proof-of-concept automations showcasing our capabilities - Establish our technical stack and development workflows - Create reusable templates and frameworks for common automation patterns - Document processes for scaling and client onboarding *To Apply Please share: 1. Examples of automation systems you've built (especially AI-powered) 2. Your approach to architecting scalable automation solutions 3. Your availability and preferred working arrangement 4. What excites you about this partnership opportunity This is a chance to be a founding technical partner in a growing automation practice with revenue sharing on every client project. If you're ready to build something impactful, let's talk.

Posted 2 months ago

Framer Website Designer Needed

  • Fixed price
  • Intermediate
  • Est. budget: $100.00

Hi, I’m looking for an experienced Framer website designer to build a high-end, modern one-page website for my company FlyVision. FlyVision creates premium real estate media for high-end real estate agents, such as photography, videography, drone and FPV videos, social media content, and branding content for real estate offices. The goal of this project is to replace my current website, which feels too cheap, static and basic. I want a website that feels professional, clean, modern and high-end, with smooth animations and strong visual presentation. The website must be built entirely in Framer, because I want to be able to: Change text myself Replace images and videos myself Make small adjustments without needing a developer I have recorded a detailed explanation video where I explain exactly how I want the website to look and function. This video, together with my current website and a competitor website, should be used as the main reference. What you must include in your proposal Please include the following clearly and at the beginning of your proposal: Examples of Framer websites you have built before (links required) Your price (fixed price or clear price range) for this project Your estimated delivery time (how long it will take to finish the website) Applications without these three points will not be considered. Important notes before you apply The website must be built in Framer I will add all text, images and videos myself You do not need to create or place content Your focus is on: Design Layout Animations Structure Framer setup References Current website: https://flyvision.nl/ Competitor website (style & animation reference): https://houseofpouw.com/#home Explanation video: https://www.icloud.com/photos/#/icloudlinks/00eMsqnTIcr0DtUFcz76_paQQ/ Use the color profiles in the attchement. Website structure & requirements (one-page) 1. Hero section Text and buttons positioned similar to the competitor example Fullscreen hero video Video requirements: No autoplay Plays on click Audio enabled Smooth, high-end animations 2. Services section Three services displayed next to each other Horizontal scroll or slider interaction Clean and modern layout 3. Video showcase section Slider with multiple videos Combination of: Horizontal videos Vertical (social media-style) videos Smooth transitions and animations 4. About / Mission sections Two simple sections Each section: Image on one side Text on the other Flexible layout (text length can grow) 5. Portfolio section Photo grid Before / after image sliders (3 examples) Video slider: 5 videos Autoplay enabled Mute / unmute button Smooth slide-in / slide-out animations Compact spacing Title and text under each block 6. Social media section Three vertical social media videos next to each other Title above the section 7. Contact section Clean and professional layout Contact form with: Name Email Phone number Message Visible company contact details Space for a short text Design & technical requirements Built fully in Framer Smooth animations and transitions Color palette similar to the competitor website Font: Inter (bold where appropriate) High-end, professional and modern look Fully responsive (desktop & mobile) Future work If the collaboration goes well, there may be future work for updates or additional pages. Thank you for your time. I’m mainly interested in your previous Framer work, your price, and your timeline. Best regards, FlyVision

Posted last month

Senior Webflow or Framer Developer for Creative Production Studio

  • Hourly: $30.00 - $55.00
  • Expert
  • Est. time: 1 to 3 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

We are Pilothouse Media, a creative production studio based in Ontario, Canada. We are undergoing a major rebrand and looking for an expert Webflow or Framer Developer to build our new, high-end website and launch it by May 13, 2026. You will be handed high-fidelity Figma files and will work directly with our Digital Project Manager, who will manage all sprint tickets and QA. We do not micro-manage code, but we demand pixel-perfect execution, smooth performance, and a perfectly structured CMS. The Technical Challenge (The "Behavioral Split"): We are running a single domain that caters to two different audiences. We are using a flat URL structure with a dynamic navigation menu. When a user is on the default pages (e.g., /work, /roster), the global navigation shows Menu A. When a user clicks into the corporate hub (/brands), the global navigation must instantly swap to Menu B (e.g., /portfolio, /services), locking them into that user journey. You will also need to build two separate CMS collections for our portfolio (one filtering high-end commercials, one filtering corporate case studies). Deliverables: - Pixel-perfect development from Figma to Webflow/Framer. - Complex CMS setup for Portfolios, Directors Roster, and SEO Blog. - Premium, buttery-smooth animations (page transitions, hover states, scroll triggers) that do not impact load speed. - Technical SEO foundations (proper H1/H2 tags, fast load times, alt text).

Elementor Pro Header Redesign (Mobile + Desktop) Platform: WordPress + Elementor Pro Task Overview I need an experienced Elementor Pro developer to redesign and clean up my site header using Elementor Theme Builder, with a strong focus on mobile UX, logo sizing, and padding. Check out attached screenshot of the header and let me know which color you suggest for slim top bar. This is not a full redesign. All work must be done inside Elementor (no CSS hacks unless approved). Required Header Design (Must Match Exactly) 🔹 Mobile Header Design (Critical) The mobile header must have TWO rows ONLY: Row 1 – Slim Contact Bar (Top) A very thin bar showing contact information immediately: 📞 Phone number (tap-to-call) ✉️ Email address (tap-to-email) 📍 Office address (short format) Requirements: Height approx. 28–34px Small, clean font Icons recommended Single-line layout (no wrapping) Must feel light, not bulky ⚠️ Contact info must appear ONLY here ❌ Do NOT duplicate contact info inside the menu Row 2 – Main Header [ LOGO ] [ ☰ ] Requirements: Logo on the left Hamburger menu on the right Vertically centered Compact spacing (no excess padding) 🔹 Mobile Menu (When ☰ is opened) The mobile menu must show PAGES ONLY-Navigation only Logo Size Requirements (Very Important) Use Elementor responsive controls. Desktop, Tablet, and Mobile must be independent (no inheritance). Target widths: Desktop: 145px Tablet: 120px Mobile: 105px Hard constraints: Logo height must remain UNDER 48px on desktop Logo height must remain UNDER 40px on mobile Desktop Header Logo, address, phone, and email may remain visible Reduce padding / min-height so the header does not look tall or bulky Clean, professional spacing Padding & Bulkiness Fix Remove unnecessary top/bottom padding Remove excessive min-height Header height should be driven by logo size, not padding Rules Use Elementor Pro → Theme Builder → Header Do NOT change colors, fonts, or content outside the header Do NOT redesign pages Do NOT use global CSS unless approved This task should be completed in one pass Acceptance Criteria I will approve the task only if: Mobile header shows phone, email, and address immediately Top contact bar remains thin and single-line Contact info does NOT appear inside the mobile menu Header is compact and not bulky Logo height ≤ 48px desktop / ≤ 40px mobile Mobile menu contains pages only Desktop and mobile styles do not overwrite each other To Apply Please confirm: You have experience with Elementor Pro Theme Builder You understand responsive breakpoint overrides You can complete this today

Posted last month

🎮 Hiring Unity Developer – Online Multiplayer Fish Shooting Game (Realtime + Backend)

  • Fixed price
  • Entry Level
  • Est. budget: $300.00

============================================================ PROJECT OVERVIEW We are developing an online multiplayer fish shooting game with 4 players per room, realtime gameplay, server-authoritative architecture, backend-controlled economy (coin, bullet, jackpot), server-controlled bots, and config-driven design (no hardcoded gameplay values). We are looking for an experienced Unity Developer to build the client side of the game. Backend will handle all authoritative logic. ============================================================ CORE ARCHITECTURE REQUIREMENTS SERVER-AUTHORITATIVE MODEL Server handles fish spawning, fish HP, damage calculation, fish death, reward calculation, jackpot logic, and room state. Unity client sends shooting events and renders visuals strictly based on server responses. Client must NOT calculate damage, fish death, or rewards. ============================================================ GAMEPLAY SCOPE ROOM SYSTEM Maximum 4 players per room. Rooms may contain real users and bots. Server decides whether a player is a bot or real user. Room states: WAITING, PLAYING, FINISHED. If server marks a player as bot, Unity simulates shooting behavior. FISH SYSTEM Each fish has HP, speed, movement path ID, reward multiplier. All fish configuration must be loaded from backend API (e.g. /game-config). No hardcoded fish data inside Unity. SHOOTING SYSTEM Unity sends shoot event to server. Server calculates damage. Server responds with result. Unity renders hit/death animation. ECONOMY SYSTEM Coin balance handled by backend. Bullet cost validated by backend. Jackpot pool calculated by backend. Unity only displays animation when jackpot triggers. All calculations must be server-side. ============================================================ REALTIME REQUIREMENTS Use WebSocket or propose suitable realtime solution. Must synchronize fish spawn, damage events, coin updates, jackpot events, player join/leave. ============================================================ PERFORMANCE & OPTIMIZATION Server does NOT continuously send fish positions. Server sends spawn event with path ID, speed, and random seed. Unity calculates and renders movement locally. Goal: reduce bandwidth and support scalability. ============================================================ TECHNICAL EXPECTATIONS Clean and maintainable architecture. Clear separation of network layer, game state management, and UI. Easily extendable structure. No gameplay hardcoding. ============================================================ DELIVERABLES Fully working Unity project. Realtime 4-player room support. Bot simulation based on server response. Fish spawning and damage system. Jackpot animation system. Clean source code. ============================================================ IDEAL CANDIDATE Experience building multiplayer games. Strong understanding of WebSocket or realtime systems. Familiar with server-authoritative architecture. Experience with scalable game systems. Bonus: experience in fish shooting or casino-style games. ============================================================ WHEN APPLYING, PLEASE INCLUDE Portfolio of multiplayer games. Proposed realtime solution (WebSocket, Photon, Colyseus, etc.). Estimated timeline. Suggested Unity project architecture. ============================================================ LONG-TERM GOAL Build a strong technical foundation that can scale to hundreds of rooms, allows backend-controlled gameplay adjustments, and avoids rebuilding architecture in the future.
